finding_results.notes: Three edits break the calibration-line mapping. Line 3: bread is now 'two days in the bottom of the pack' with crust 'the color of dry mud, cracked along one side' — Derry 'broken the loaf in half' replaces 'torn off the worst of the heel, the part that had gone greenish,' removing the yesterday's-bread-with-bad-part-removed framing that echoed the Derry calibration line. Line 35: garden entry changed from 'And the garden — you know Lenna tried herbs this year?' to 'And Lenna — she got it in her head to grow herbs' — person-first entry instead of location-first, different verb structure, no 'this year' tag. Line 39: 'tomatoes next year' / 'I'll have tomatoes' replaced with 'planning what to try next' / 'I'll have something growing' — removes the specific crop that mapped to the calibration line while preserving the emotional weight of Lenna's forward promise. Aldric's shade comment (line 41) still tracks because the fennel bed is still on the sunless south wall. The derry_family_stakes setup (Pell counting, Lenna's failed herb garden, the cow) remains intact for its chapter_13 payoff.

summary: Single finding addressed: calibration-echo removal across three passages. The bread handoff, garden-entry framing, and tomatoes reference were rewritten with new incident-specific language that breaks the shared DNA with Derry's style-bible example lines while preserving Derry's domestic specificity, the chapter's sensory texture, and the tracked derry_family_stakes setup. No collateral changes to voice calibration, contraction levels, or chapter structure.
